title: DeltaFix
short description: DeltaFix was a DGPS system that was used to provide precision positioning used in the survey and oceanographic industry.
description:
**DeltaFix** was a DGPS system that was used to provide precision positioning used in the survey and oceanographic industry.

DeltaFix, owned by Fugro Survey, was a development of [HyperFix](https://www.sigidwiki.com/wiki/HyperFix) that enables DGPS (Differential GPS) corrections to be transmitted using the data time slot 'D' in HyperFix transmissions.

There are currently no DeltaFix stations operating in Europe anymore.
